subcodes.first_line: Your letter dated August 1919 has been received and its noble contents duly noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اغستوس سنه ۱۹۱۹ تاریخیله ورود ایدن نامه نامیلری مال منیفی قرین اذعان
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
